raw_consumer_statement: This Fraud account has been ongoing for a year or so! I've repeatedly called XXXX attempting to resolve this issue to no avail! Most of the charges are interest. I paid and closed all other XXXX XXXX accounts and have refused to do business with them! I found this account backtracking automatic payments made to them. I called to have them to send verified charges. They sent me the statements and as I thought, I had not made any of the charges! They said that I probably authorized a contractor to and therefore was responsible for them. Entertaining that possibility, I checked w/another Real Estate client who had used the only Contractor who'd fit such a scenario. She'd sued him and won the judgement. He was deemed " uncollectible ''. I told XXXX. They told me that unless I could produce a similar judgement or police report I'd still be held liable. I called back again. They hung up on me twice! They warned me that if I discontinued automatic payments my ( good ) credit would be ruined. I'm cancelling further payments!
